title: Shirahoshi Is Still Targeted
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Shirahoshi, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The core beat is shirahoshi is still targeted.
scene: The scene follows shirahoshi is still targeted, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Shirahoshi, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: GyaHaha Hahah!! Look how pathetic they are!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The great warrior Neptune is really going to be killed!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are no soldiers left to fight for him...!! And the enemy is a hundred thousand strong!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Madame Shirley! When is that pirate gonna come and destroy the island?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My talent only allows me...to witness events that are to come...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It could happen tomorrow... or a year from now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If he comes and smashes up the island now..

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...it'll be bad for us, but it'll be really bad for them, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I think he should come now, too!! I don't want the king to die!!

dialogue.speaker: Hody Jones
dialogue.text: Are you listening, straw hat Luffy??!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...If you're going to destroy this island someday ... come and do it now!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Come and tear this whole place apart!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you're hiding some- where on the island, then come and show yourself!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: unbelievable. This brings a whole new meaning to "clitching at straws".

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: besides... just this once, Shirley's prediction can't possibly be true...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I think it's time someone hauled you delusional fools back toreality!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Watch and despair!! The head of Neptune, former King of this country, is about to fly!!

summary: Shirahoshi Is Still Targeted. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
